failures.description: The agent misread or misused the ProductCatalogSearch output, selecting the last item in an ascending price list instead of the first cheapest item.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The tool output at index 3 was available and directly relevant: it returned 11 available Electric Kettles sorted by price ascending. The first item is item_id 1240311797 at $137.17, making it the cheapest. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item_id 2243454707 at $164.46, which is the last and most expensive item in the returned list. This contradicts the tool output and was not corrected later.
